name: Mekidulu 72" Modern Wood Cat Tree - Horizon Series Sky-Dining Tower
features: Sky-Dining Experience: 4 integrated elevated stainless steel feeding stations.
Architectural Stability: 72.1" tall with reinforced high-density wood.
8 Levels of Exploration: Includes Space Pod, Private Condo, and Decks.
Hygienic Wood Finish: Moisture-resistant and easy to sanitize.
Professional Grade: Designed for multi-cat households and heavy usage.
Easy Assembly: Modular design with clear step-by-step instructions.
Aesthetic Integration: Minimalist modern design fits any home decor.
